app.name: Wishly
app.setupBody: Add your public Supabase URL and anon key to start real authentication and persistence.

auth.name: Name
auth.resetPasswordBody: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if the provider is configured for it.
auth.resetSent: If your account exists, a reset link is on the way.

home.title: Your wishlists
home.heroTitle: Make gift ideas feel thoughtful, simple, and pressure-free.
home.heroBody: Invite friends with one gentle link. They can reserve gifts without creating an account, while surprises stay protected.
home.emptyBody: Create your first wishlist and start sharing ideas that feel natural to send.

lists.profileBody: Manage your account basics and keep your sharing language in sync.
lists.profileEmptyBody: This first version keeps the focus on creating, sharing, and reserving wishlists.

wishlist.emptyBody: Add a few ideas so guests can choose without guessing.
wishlist.message: I made this little list to help everyone who asked for gift ideas 💛
wishlist.notFoundBody: This wishlist does not exist or you do not have access to it.

visitor.title: Choose a gift for Sofia
visitor.body: Reserve it to avoid duplicate gifts.
visitor.privateBody: The public link is unavailable or has been removed.

create.title: Create a list in a few gentle steps
create.body: Add the occasion, a date, and a short message. You can polish the details later.
create.successBody: Your list is ready. Add a few thoughtful ideas, then share it when it feels right.

errors.auth: Please sign in again before creating a wishlist.
errors.profile: We couldn't prepare your Wishly profile yet. Please try again in a moment.
errors.permission: Your account is not allowed to create wishlists yet. Apply the latest database policies and try again.
errors.eventDate: Check the event date and try again.
errors.visibility: Check the visibility option and try again.
errors.retry: We had trouble generating a public link. Please try again.
errors.generic: We couldn't save your wishlist right now.

giftForm.title: Add something thoughtful
giftForm.body: A store link, estimated price, and priority help guests choose with confidence.
giftForm.noteHint: Optional details like color, size, or what matters most.
giftForm.successBody: It is now part of the wishlist with clear status and priority for guests.

giftFunding.paymentSandbox: This sandbox checkout confirms the contribution without a real card charge.
giftFunding.checkoutNotFound: This contribution checkout could not be found.

affiliate.disclosure: Wishly may earn a commission from eligible purchases.
affiliate.redirectErrorTitle: We couldn't open this purchase link
affiliate.redirectErrorBody: Please go back to the wishlist and try again.

giftDelete.title: Delete this gift?
giftDelete.error: Could not delete gift. Please try again.

admin.accessDeniedBody: You do not have permission to access this area.
admin.title: Title
admin.validationError: Please review the form fields and try again.

reservation.title: Reserve gift
reservation.name: Your name
reservation.successBody: Thank you. This gift is now marked as reserved.

validation.passwordMin: Password must have at least 6 characters.
